creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
This is the most aesthetic cafe I’ve been to!

📍 La Nena, Al Quoz 
🏢 quite hidden in the industrial neighborhood yet easy to find when pinned in Google Maps

🤎 Spanish cafe and concept store
🤎 Super aesthetically pleasing ambiance
🤎 What I tried and loved: Iced Spanish Latte (30 AED) and Tiramisu Cheesecake (28 AED)

Tag your coffee besties!
